title: Breakfast in America
notes: Honestly when I think about this album, its just great. I don't know how else I can describe it. It does a lot of basic things really really well. The instrumentation in particular I think is the best part. The grand piano, the synths, the cool guitar, and the toned vocals all come together to create a sound I can listen to for hours. There's dynamic and tonal contrast from song to song as well.
highlights: Highlights are definitely the instrumentation as mentioned above. I really enjoy 'Breakfast in America' and 'Logical Song' because I was kind of raised on these songs.
lowlights: The only thing I think I am missing is more of an over-arching theme or story. I understand it is about hyper-consumerism and the expectation versus reality of the American Dream. But I just don't think it is tied together as much as I wanted it. having said that, that is very small criticism.
